ctx.name: Sarah
ctx.notes: She is always late to work

introQueue.label: The real version
introQueue.name: Tell me about your week — the real version.
introQueue.description: Kim Scott's 'care personally' made concrete. Signals that a performed answer won't cut it.

introQueue.label: Friction scan
introQueue.name: What's been slower or harder than it should have been?
introQueue.description: Invites them to name blockers without framing it as complaint.

introQueue.label: Opening pace check
introQueue.name: How's the last two weeks actually felt — energy-wise?
introQueue.description: Opener that invites a real answer rather than 'fine'. Reads wellbeing directly.

focus_points.label: Punctuality and its impact on workload.
focus_points.reason: Notes mention she is always late to work. Worth exploring if this is affecting her workload management or team dynamics.

focus_points.label: Work in flight this cycle.
focus_points.reason: Standard bi-weekly anchor — she needs space to surface what she is actually shipping, independent of the punctuality issue.

focus_points.label: What she'd want more of from you.
focus_points.reason: Bi-weekly hygiene at this seniority — the cleanest channel for her to redirect the relationship if something is off.

brief.coreIssue: As a UX Lead, {{NAME}}'s consistent tardiness may be impacting her workload management and team dynamics. This bi-weekly check-in will explore how her punctuality affects her productivity and the current projects she's handling. Additionally, the conversation will address any support she needs from you to manage her priorities effectively.
brief.openingQuestion: How do you feel your punctuality is impacting your workload and team collaboration, and what adjustments might help you manage this better?
listenFor: whether punctuality affects her workload management
if they feel team dynamics are impacted
whether she has a clear view of her current priorities
avoid: do not assume the reason for her tardiness
do not jump to solutions without understanding her perspective
brief.goodOutcome: You and {{NAME}} have agreed on a specific adjustment to her schedule or workload to address the punctuality concern.
brief.suggestedAction: Schedule a follow-up in two weeks to review the impact of the agreed changes on her punctuality and workload.

queueRef.label: The real version
queueRef.name: Tell me about your week — the real version.
queueRef.description: Kim Scott's 'care personally' made concrete. Signals that a performed answer won't cut it.

queueRef.label: Friction scan
queueRef.name: What's been slower or harder than it should have been?
queueRef.description: Invites them to name blockers without framing it as complaint.

queueRef.label: Opening pace check
queueRef.name: How's the last two weeks actually felt — energy-wise?
queueRef.description: Opener that invites a real answer rather than 'fine'. Reads wellbeing directly.

queueRef.label: Week's clarity recap
queueRef.name: What feels clear about your priorities right now, and what's still murky?
queueRef.description: Surfaces areas of clarity and confusion in current priorities.

queueRef.label: Punctuality impact
queueRef.name: I've noticed you're often late to work — how does that affect your workload and team dynamics?
queueRef.description: Explores how punctuality may be impacting workload management or team dynamics.

queueRef.label: Current blockers
queueRef.name: What's currently slowing you down, and is any of it within your control?
queueRef.description: Identifies current blockers and distinguishes between internal and external factors.

queueRef.label: Momentum drivers
queueRef.name: What's driving your current momentum, and what might stall it?
queueRef.description: Examines factors contributing to and potentially hindering momentum.

queueRef.label: Project excitement
queueRef.name: Which project are you most excited about right now, and why?
queueRef.description: Identifies projects that energize and engage the employee.

queueRef.label: Manager support needs
queueRef.name: What would you want more of from me to support your work?
queueRef.description: Explores areas where the manager can provide more support or resources.

queueRef.label: Balancing workload
queueRef.name: How are you balancing your workload with the team's needs?
queueRef.description: Explores strategies for managing workload in relation to team obligations.

queueRef.label: Next steps priority
queueRef.name: Given what we've discussed, what's your priority for the next two weeks?
queueRef.description: Concludes the meeting by establishing short-term priorities.

queueRef.label: Actionable takeaway
queueRef.name: What's the one thing you're taking away from today that you'll actually do differently?
queueRef.description: Encourages commitment to actionable change based on the discussion.

closer.label: Actionable takeaway
closer.name: What's the one thing you're taking away from today that you'll actually do differently?
closer.description: Encourages commitment to actionable change based on the discussion.
